title: Six hospitalised after accident on Hoekwil Road
description: GEORGE NEWS - Six moderately injured adults...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Six moderately injured adults were transported to the hospital by ER24 paramedics after a Ford Ranger bakkie and a minibus taxi collided on Hoekwil Road this morning, Wednesday 19 March.

The accident took place near the Anchor Park equestrian estate.


> Details about the exact cause of the accident still have to be confirmed.


The taxi is used for transporting learners to and from school, but it is unclear whether there were children in the vehicle at the time of the accident.

The bakkie next to the road near the equestrian estate.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
